nodes.label: Custom OpenAI-compatible providers rationale
nodes.rationale: The openai-compatible-custom provider intentionally allows no API key so local AI API providers such as Ollama, LM Studio, and local GGUF servers can be used without authentication, and this should not be treated as a security issue during review.

nodes.label: Workspace migration for thread settings
nodes.rationale: Workspace load and save paths apply migration that adds default modelSettings to legacy threads so older clients are upgraded transparently without breaking changes.
